name: Frodo Baggins
description: Ring-bearer and hero of the War of the Ring.

name: Samwise Gamgee
description: Frodo's loyal gardener and companion.

name: Gandalf
description: Maia spirit and guide of the Fellowship.

name: Aragorn
description: Heir of Isildur and rightful King of Gondor.

name: Legolas
description: Prince of the Woodland Realm and skilled archer.

name: Gimli
description: Son of Glóin and stout-hearted member of the Fellowship.

name: Boromir
description: Son of the Steward of Gondor and valiant warrior.

name: Meriadoc Brandybuck
description: Merry - one of Frodo's closest friends.

name: Peregrin Took
description: Pippin - young and curious hobbit of the Fellowship.

name: Sauron
description: The Dark Lord and maker of the One Ring.

name: Galadriel
description: Lady of the Golden Wood and bearer of Nenya.

name: Saruman
description: Head of the Istari order corrupted by the Ring's power.

name: Bilbo Baggins
description: Finder of the One Ring and author of There and Back Again.

name: Elrond
description: Half-elven lord and keeper of Vilya.

name: Théoden
description: King of Rohan who rode to the aid of Gondor.

name: Éowyn
description: Shieldmaiden of Rohan who slew the Lord of the Nazgûl.

name: Faramir
description: Younger son of Denethor and Captain of Gondor.

name: Treebeard
description: Eldest of the Ents and shepherd of the trees.

name: Shelob
description: Great spider who guarded the pass of Cirith Ungol.

name: Gollum
description: Former hobbit corrupted by centuries of Ring-bearing.

name: Nazgûl
description: Nine kings of Men enslaved by the One Ring.

name: Celeborn
description: Lord of the Golden Wood and husband of Galadriel.

name: Glorfindel
description: Ancient elf-lord of great power who aided the Fellowship.

name: Denethor
description: Steward of Gondor consumed by grief and the palantír.
